description: Register a dagster-salesforce SalesforceResource for use by other components

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource. Other components reference it via resource_key.

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the Salesforce password

security_token_env_var.label: Security Token Env Var
security_token_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the Salesforce security token

domain.label: Domain
domain.description: Salesforce domain: 'test' for sandbox, 'login' for production (default), or custom domain

consumer_key_env_var.label: Consumer Key Env Var
consumer_key_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the Connected App consumer key (for OAuth)

consumer_secret_env_var.label: Consumer Secret Env Var
consumer_secret_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the Connected App consumer secret (for OAuth)

name: Salesforce Resource
